title: Giới từ (1) — Thời gian & Nơi chốn
summary: Giới từ chỉ thời gian (at, on, in, since, for, during...) và nơi chốn (at, in, on, above, below...). Phân biệt các giới từ dễ nhầm lẫn.

sections.title: Định nghĩa & Giới từ chỉ thời gian
sections.body:
## Định nghĩa Giới từ

Giới từ (Preposition) là từ loại chỉ sự liên quan giữa các từ loại trong cụm từ, trong câu.

Những từ thường đi sau giới từ là tân ngữ (Object), Verb + ing, Cụm danh từ...

- *Mozart was born in Salzburg in 1756.*
  → Mozart sinh ra tại Salzburg vào năm 1756.

## Các loại giới từ chính

- Giới từ chỉ thời gian: at, on, in, before, after, during, by, until/till, since, for, afterwards,...
- Giới từ chỉ nơi chốn: at, in, on, over, above, below, beneath, under,....
- Giới từ chỉ sự chuyển dịch: to, into, from, across, through, along, round, around,...
- Giới từ chỉ thể cách: with, without, ....
- Giới từ chỉ mục đích: to, for...
- Giới từ chỉ lý do: at, for, on ....

## Giới từ chỉ thời gian chi tiết

| Giới từ | Cách dùng | Ví dụ |
|---|---|---|
| **at** | Vào lúc (thường đi với giờ, thời điểm ngắn trong ngày) | at dawn (bình minh); at midnight (nửa đêm); at 6 o'clock (lúc 6 giờ); at the age of 16 (ở tuổi 16) |
| **on** | Thường đi với ngày, hoặc thứ trong tuần, buổi của ngày cụ thể | on Monday (vào thứ Hai); on June 1st (vào ngày 1 tháng 6); on Monday morning (vào sáng thứ Hai) |
| **before** | Trước (Before + V-ing hoặc Before + mốc thời gian) | The meal must be done before 7:00 p.m.; I must finish my work before I go home. |
| **from... to/till/until** | Từ... đến... | My mother works from morning till night. |
| **since** | Từ khi (since + mốc thời gian trong quá khứ) | I have learnt English since I was a four-year-old child.; I have lived here since 1998. |
| **during** | Trong suốt một khoảng thời gian diễn ra sự kiện (During + Danh từ/Cụm danh từ. Lưu ý: During không đi với mệnh đề) | during the Middle Ages (trong thời Trung cổ); during the summer (trong suốt mùa hè) |
| **for** | Trong khoảng (for + khoảng thời gian) | Last night, I slept for 3 hours. |
| **till/until** | Cho đến khi (till/until + Mốc thời gian/Mệnh đề) | I will wait here until 11:30. |
| **after/afterwards** | Sau/Sau đó (after/afterwards + Mốc thời gian/Mệnh đề) | I called him and then/afterwards I came to visit him. |

sections.title: Giới từ chỉ nơi chốn
sections.body:
## Giới từ chỉ nơi chốn chi tiết

| Giới từ | Cách dùng | Ví dụ |
|---|---|---|
| **at** | Tại một địa điểm cụ thể, xác định | at school (ở trường); at work (ở chỗ làm); at the bus stop (ở trạm xe buýt) |
| **in** | Trong một không gian, quốc gia, thành phố, khu rừng, bầu trời... | in the room (trong phòng); in the forest (trong rừng); in the sky (trên bầu trời) |
| **from** | Từ (nguồn gốc, xuất xứ) | I'm from Hanoi. |
| **on, above, over** | Trên (on: tiếp xúc bề mặt; above: cao hơn so với vật khác; over: trùm lên, bao phủ) | The cat is on the table.; They built a new room above the garage.; I put a rug over the sleeping child. |
| **under, below, beneath** | Dưới (under: trực tiếp bên dưới, dính liền hoặc bị phủ; below: thấp hơn về nhiệt độ, chiều cao, thang điểm, cấp bậc; beneath: dùng trong văn phong trang trọng) | Most of the iceberg is under the water.; The standard of his work is well below the average of his class.; As a musician, he is far beneath his brother. |

sections.title: Phân biệt giới từ dễ nhầm lẫn
sections.body:
## Phân biệt các giới từ dễ nhầm lẫn

### at vs in vs on (Thời gian)

- at: dùng trước thời gian ngắn (giờ, phút, giây, khoảnh khắc): at 6 o'clock, at midnight, at this moment...
- in: dùng trước thời gian dài (tháng, mùa, năm, thập kỷ): in June, in 2016, in Spring...
- on: dùng trước ngày, thứ trong lịch hoặc ngày cụ thể: on Saturday, on this day, on June 1st...

### On time vs In time

- on time: đúng giờ (theo lịch trình, không muộn chút nào). Ví dụ: The 11.45 train left on time.
- in time: kịp lúc (vừa kịp để làm việc gì đó). Ví dụ: Will you be home in time for dinner?

### In the end vs At the end

- In the end, ... = Finally (cuối cùng, kết quả là). Ví dụ: He got more and more angry. In the end he just walked out of the room.
- At the end of + sth (ở thời điểm kết thúc của cái gì). Ví dụ: I'm going away at the end of January.

### arrive in vs arrive at

- arrive at: khi đến nơi chốn nhỏ (sân bay, nhà ga, khách sạn...). Ví dụ: They arrived at the airport at 10.00.
- arrive in: khi đến nơi chốn lớn (quận, tỉnh, thành phố, quốc gia...). Ví dụ: They arrived in Ha Noi at night.

### in vs into vs out of (Không gian)

- in: chỉ vị trí tĩnh bên trong (không chuyển hướng). Ví dụ: in the room, in the office...
- into: chỉ sự chuyển động từ ngoài vào trong. Ví dụ: I go into the room.
- out of: chỉ sự chuyển động từ trong ra ngoài. Ví dụ: I go out of the room.

### for vs during vs since (Thời gian)

- for: dùng để đo khoảng thời gian (for two months, for the last few years...).
- during: dùng chỉ hành động xảy ra trong suốt sự kiện, kỳ nghỉ, bộ phim (during the vacation, during the film...).
- since: dùng để đánh dấu mốc thời gian bắt đầu (since last Monday, since I was a child...).

### between vs among

- between: dùng cho vị trí giữa 2 người/vật rõ ràng. Ví dụ: I sit between Lan and Huong.
- among: dùng giữa nhiều người/vật (không xác định số lượng cụ thể). Ví dụ: He was happy to be among his friends again.

### Bài tập minh họa

- I haven't seen Kate for a few days. I last saw her __________ Tuesday. → **on** (Dùng 'on' trước các danh từ chỉ ngày trong tuần (Tuesday).)
- __________ the end of the street, there is a path leading to the river. → **At** (Sử dụng cấu trúc 'At the end of + Noun' để chỉ vị trí ở cuối cái gì.)
- I like to get up __________ time to have a big breakfast before going to work. → **in** (Dùng 'in time' mang ý nghĩa là kịp lúc, kịp thời gian để thực hiện hành động ăn sáng trước khi đi làm.)
- It rained __________ three days without stopping. → **for** ('three days' là một khoảng thời gian nên ta dùng giới từ 'for'.)
- We usually go out at weekends, but we don't often go out __________ the week. → **during** (Dùng 'during' để chỉ hành động xảy ra xuyên suốt trong tuần (during the week).)

exerciseSets.title: Luyện Tập Giới Từ Livestream (50 câu)

exercises.question: It’s typical ________businessmen to shake hands in formal meetings.
We were all shocked ________ the things we saw on the news.
I wouldn’t like to be in her position. I feel sorry ________ her.
Cheques are useful ________ travellers.
Are you successful ________ your experiment?
She seems friendly ________  everyone in the village.
She was sad ________ my refusal.
Ben isn’t very happy at college. He says he’s bored ________ the course he’s doing.
Quang Linh is popular ________ folk songs.
Why are you always so rude  ________ your parents? Can’t you be nice ________  them?
The student is quick ________understanding what the teacher explains.
She is never late ________ work.
Yesterday, Nga was absent ________ class because she was ill.
We always have the same food every day. I’m fed up ________ it.
Are you still upset ________ what I said to you yesterday?
I was surprised  ________  the way he behaved.
Don’t be worried ________ the money! I’ll lend you.
It’s made me much more sensitive ________ the needs of the disable.
Jane has been very concerned ________ her mother’s poor health.
Albert said he was very ashamed ________ his friend’s bad manners.
Can we be sure ________ his honesty?
Is he guilty or innocent ________ the crime?
Fred is capable ________ doing better work than he’s doing at present.
While studying, he was financially dependent ________ his parents.
If you’re not satisfied ________ your essay, I suggest that you rewrite it.
People nowadays are interested ________ saving money and natural resources.
We are fond ________ listening to music.
He is angry ________ losing his wallet.
That hotel is famous ________ it’s pleasant atmosphere and fine food.
I certainly hope that David is aware ________ all the problems involved.
Dogs are usually very faithful ________ their masters if treated properly.
I was amazed ________ his behavior.
I’m sure the explaination in the book will be quite clear ________ you.
Disneyland is crowded ________ tourists in July.
I wish Carl would take a vacation. It would be good ________his health.
Are you serious ________ learning to be an architect?
He is very keen ________ Englis, but he is not good ________ listening.
I am sorry ________the noise last night. We were having a party.
What he said was contrary ________ common sense.
The message he sent to me was full ________ mistakes.
Don’t worry. We’ll look after you. There is nothing to be scared________.
Linda doesn’t look very well. I’m worried ________ her.
She was experienced ________ marketing.
The word ‘man’ is derived ________ the Sanskrit ‘manas’.
He is not confused ________ animals and speaks very clearly about the panther, deer and their characteristics.
He is generally quite content ________ himself and his life.
This kind of thing happens sometimes, but I was annoyed ________ myself ________ handling it badly.
My problem was that I was brilliant ________ maths but hopeless ________ English.
The film is based ________ a novel by Pat Conroy.
These toys are not suitable ________ children under five.
I shall meet you _____ the corner of the street
It never snows here _____ Christmas.
He never comes _____ time for the class.
We had a few problems at first, but ........... the end everything was OK.
I'm going away ....... the end of this week
I waited for you .... half an hour and then decided that you weren't coming.
I have no time _____ the moment
There is vocabulary _____ the end of the book.
I had been away for many years. …..... that time, many things had changed.
Jack started a new job a few weeks ago. Before that he was out of work .... six months.
I wasn't sure whether I had come to the right office. There was no name .... the door.
I like that picture hanging .... the wall ..... the kitchen
The telephone and the doorbell rang .......... the same time
My pencil is …….the book and the notebook
We had a lot of problems with our car. ……the end we sold it
We got to the bus-stop just…..time to catch the last bus to Hanoi
A delegation of senior French ministers will arrive…….. London today.
When I finally arrive ……….my house, all I want to do is to sleep
I have lived in the United States ....... one year.
She has been a nurse ……..... April.
He usually pays me on Friday but last week he didn't pay me………… the following Monday.
.......... our stay in Paris, we visited a lot of museums and galleries.
I felt really ill last week. I could hardly eat anything ....... three days.
I'll be moving to a new address ...... the end of September.
The course begins ......... 7 January and ends sometimes ........ April.
There are usually a lot of parties .......... New Year's Eve.
It was a lovely day. There wasn't a cloud ..........the sky.
There are some beautiful trees .... the park.
There were many interruptions .... the president's speech.
The president gave a long speech. She spoke .... two hours.
There are forty students …………..the class
The oranges are …………the table.
We will leave …………. 10:30 ……..Monday
Valentine is ………. 14th February.
We are going to have a party ………..Christmas
There are some food …… the fridge.
The country looks beautiful ……….springs
I don’t like getting up early ……….. Sunday morning
I have breakfast …………7:00 every morning.
I like swimming ……….the summer
He was born ….. 1995.
I’ll see her ………..the beginning of the week
I’m very busy………… present
…… the last few days, I haven’t been able to sleep ……night
……….Saturday night, I went to bed …..midnight.
Summer comes…..Spring
The train service isn’t very good. The trains are rarely ……
We usually go out at weekends, but we don’t often go out……..the week.
– Can we eat now? – Let’s wait….. Peter comes
They have married ……………October
….. the end of the month, I’m going to stay at my uncle’s place ….. Chicago …….. a week.
Two dogs ran across the street. Luckily, I stopped the car just……
The phone rang three times …..the night.
I live …..12 Columbus street
….first, we didn’t like each other very much but ….the end we became good friends.
Janet is ….. home right now.
There is a beautiful garden …….the back of the house.
He was sitting ……the top of the stairs.
We have been waiting here …. 20 minutes.
There is a funny cartoon.........TV now
The anniversary is ………. May 10th
They were very popular ……the 1980s.
I have to speak to the boss ….lunchtime
We finished the marathon …………the same time
Production at the factory was seriously affected ..... the strike.
Please come ........... 10 o'clock.
I met Smith yesterday, but I knew him long ...........that
What country do you come......?

He thought ..........a moment and then spoke
..........time of war we have to agree to things we should refuse ........time of peace.
I can't get this ring ............ my finger
Many people...........the Orient like plain boiled rice
I will stay ................London ..............about three weeks.
He walked...........the room........which we were sitting
He became a singer ...........the age of 16
I have learnt English...........6 years
He is a man..........his forties.
He was much stronger ...........his holiday in the mountain
Lan often visits her grandparents .......... the weekends
